title: Evals and Reliability
shortSummary: Build the habit of measuring quality before launch and after release with task-specific evals and failure analysis.
whyItMatters: The strongest frontier AI teams are eval-first. They ship because they can see regressions, classify failures, and compare variants under pressure. Without that, every model upgrade is a gamble.
coreConcepts: Golden sets, regression suites, and eval harnesses
Human review loops and rubric design
Error taxonomies for hallucinations, latency, and refusal failures
Release gates for prompts, models, and retrieval changes
